description: A Holoscan Module extending the Holoscan SDK.

__prompts__.module_slug: Module slug — snake_case identifier used for Python import and C++ namespace (e.g. 'my_sensor')
__prompts__.operator_slug: Initial operator name in snake_case (e.g. 'my_sensor_op'). CamelCase class name is derived.
__prompts__.language: Implementation language: 'cpp' (C++ with pybind11 Python bindings) or 'python' (pure Python)
__prompts__.contact_email: Maintainer contact email (used in Debian package metadata)
